current_entries.en_definition: A shiny, decorative adornment, sometimes sprinkled on glue to make simple artwork.

examples.english: This ring has lost its glitter.
examples.chinese: 指環沒了光澤。

current_entries.en_definition: Having a smooth, silk-like, reflective (shiny) surface.
(intransitive) To move through space (especially to or through a place). (May be used of tangible things such as people or cars, or intangible things such as moods or information.)

examples.english: I have to go to sleep.
examples.chinese: 我该去睡覺了。

current_entries.en_definition: (board game) A strategic board game, originally from China and today also popular in Japan and Korea, in which two players (black and white) attempt to control the largest area of the board with their counters.

examples.english: On a 19x19 lines board, Go is played with 361 stones (181 black and 180 white).
examples.chinese: 圍棋使用十九路棋盤，共 361 顆棋子 (181 顆黑子與 180 顆白子)。

current_entries.en_definition: (card games) A children's card game in which players ask each other for cards of a particular rank, requiring them to "fish" in a pool of additional cards if they do not have the requested card.
(Greek mythology) A magical fleece from a winged ram guarded by the hydra in the tale of Jason and the Argonauts.
A chivalric order founded in 1430 by Duke Philip III of Burgundy. Later awarded in Spain and Habsburg Austria.
(musical instruments) A percussion instrument consisting of a metal disk that emits a loud resonant sound when struck with a soft hammer.
Blood, especially that from a wound when thickened due to exposure to the air.
A cut or groove, as left by a gouge or something sharp.
(transitive) To grip suddenly; to seize; to clutch.
(intransitive) To make a sudden grasping or clutching motion (at something).
To restrain someone; to arrest.
The harvested seeds of various grass food crops eg: wheat, corn, barley.

examples.english: Rye was called the grain of poverty.
examples.chinese: 黑麦被称为贫穷的谷物。

current_entries.en_definition: The crops from which grain is harvested.

(graph theory) A set of vertices (or nodes) connected together by edges; (formally) an ordered pair of sets (V,E), where the elements of V are called vertices or nodes and E is a set of pairs (called edges) of elements of V. See also w:Graph (discrete mathematics) on Wikipedia.Wikipedia
Characterised by a dignified sense of seriousness; not cheerful. [from 16th c.]
Low in pitch, tone etc. [from 17th c.]
Serious, in a negative sense; important, formidable. [from 19th c.]
(narrowly) An excavation in the earth as a place of burial.
The color of grass and leaves; a primary additive color midway between yellow and blue which is evoked by light between roughly 495–570 nm.

examples.english: Green suits you.
examples.chinese: 綠色適合你。

current_entries.en_definition: Unripe, said of certain fruits that change color when they ripen.

examples.english: What is that building with the green roof?
examples.chinese: 那幢绿色屋顶的建筑是什麼？

current_entries.en_definition: A number of things or persons being in some relation to one another.

examples.english: The group of people came along with us.
examples.chinese: 那帮人也和我們一起来了。

current_entries.en_definition: (historical, also, figuratively) A machine used for the application of capital punishment by decapitation, consisting of a tall upright frame from which is suspended a heavy diagonal-edged blade which is dropped onto the neck of the person to be executed; also, execution using this machine.
A device used for cutting the pages of books, stacks of paper, etc., to straight edges, usually by means of a hinged or sliding blade attached to a flat platform.
A seabird of the genus Larus or of the subfamily Larinae.
A duct or channel beneath the eaves of a building to carry rain water; eavestrough.
(bowling) A groove down the sides of a bowling lane.
An action performed on a regular basis.

examples.english: You should try to form the habit of using your dictionaries.
examples.chinese: 你们该养成使用字典的习惯。

current_entries.en_definition: An action performed repeatedly and automatically, usually without awareness.
A piece of clothing worn for a specific activity; a uniform.
(Greek god) The god of the underworld and ruler of the dead, son of Cronus and Rhea, brother of Zeus and Poseidon.
(Greek mythology) The underworld, the domain of Hades, by transference from its god.
Hell.
Six (6); often used approximatively.
(bingo) six
An exclamation used in songs of praise or thanksgiving to God.
(by extension) A general expression of gratitude or adoration.
(rail) A minor railway station (usually unstaffed) in the United Kingdom.
(intransitive) To stop either temporarily or permanently.
(transitive) To bring to a stop.
(transitive) To cause to discontinue.
A thigh and/or buttock of a hog slaughtered for meat; (occasionally) the corresponding cut from some other animal.

examples.english: Carrefour's Ham offcuts are not expensive at all, but are nonetheless delicious.
examples.chinese: 家乐福的火腿剩料一点都不贵，然而却很好吃。

current_entries.en_definition: Meat from the thigh and/or buttock of a hog cured for food.
A tool with a heavy head and a handle used for pounding.
(anatomy) The malleus, a small bone of the middle ear.
(music) In a piano or dulcimer, a piece of wood covered in felt that strikes the string.
Part of a clock that strikes upon a bell to indicate the hour.
(firearms) A moving part of a firearm that strikes the firing pin to discharge a gun.
(transitive) To put a hamper or fetter on; to shackle.
The part of the forelimb below the forearm or wrist in a human, and the corresponding part in many other animals.

examples.english: All students of English should have a good English-English dictionary at hand.
examples.chinese: 所有學英語的學生應該隨手有一本好的英英詞典。

current_entries.en_definition: The part of an object which is (designed to be) held in the hand when used or moved.

examples.english: Let me handle this.
examples.chinese: 讓我來處理。

current_entries.en_definition: An instrument for effecting a purpose (either literally or figuratively); a tool, or an opportunity or pretext.
(gambling) The gross amount of wagering within a given period of time or for a given event at one of more establishments.
(transitive) To touch; to feel or hold with the hand(s).
(transitive, rare) To accustom to the hand; to take care of with the hands.
(transitive) To manage, control, or direct.
(transitive) To treat, to deal with (in a specified way).
(transitive) To deal with (a subject, argument, topic, or theme) in speaking, in writing, or in art.
(transitive, rare) To be concerned with; to be an expert in.
(intransitive, informal) To loiter; to hang around; to spend time idly.

examples.english: Hang your coat on the hook.
examples.chinese: 把你的外套掛在鉤子上。

current_entries.en_definition: (transitive, computing) To cause (a program or computer) to stop responding.
Any place of shelter.
(countable, nautical) A sheltered expanse of water, adjacent to land, in which ships may anchor or dock, especially for loading and unloading.
Physical injury; hurt; damage.
That which causes injury, damage, or loss.
(intransitive, of young animals) To emerge from an egg.
(intransitive, of eggs) To break open when a young animal emerges from it.
(transitive) To incubate eggs; to cause to hatch.
(transitive) To dislike intensely or greatly.

examples.english: I hate chemistry.
examples.chinese: 我讨厌化学。

current_entries.en_definition: (transitive) To draw or pull something heavy.
(transitive) To possess, own.

examples.english: I have to go to sleep.
examples.chinese: 我该去睡觉了。

current_entries.en_definition: A sharp blow delivered by driving the head into an opponent or object, generally by lowering the head and charging forward or by rapidly tilting the head backward and then forward.
Of or relating to the ancient Greek culture and civilization before the Hellenistic period.
Of or relating to Hellas (Greece) or the Hellenes (Greeks).
A greeting (salutation) said when meeting someone or acknowledging someone’s arrival or presence.

examples.english: Hello? Are you still here?
examples.chinese: 喂？你还在吗？

current_entries.en_definition: A greeting used when answering the telephone.
(nautical) The tiller (or, in a large ship, the wheel) which is used to control the rudder of a marine vessel; also, the entire steering apparatus of a vessel.
(nautical) The member of a vessel's crew in charge of steering the vessel; a helmsman or helmswoman.
The skin of an animal.
(transitive) To put (something) in a place where it will be out of sight or harder to discover.
(intransitive) To put oneself in a place where one will be out of sight or harder to find.
A high area; land that is higher than surrounding areas.
(painting, photography) An area or a spot in a drawing, painting, or photograph that is strongly illuminated.
(ambitransitive) To take a long walk (on something) for pleasure or exercise.
A blow; a punch; a striking against; the collision of one body against another; the stroke that touches anything.

examples.english: It is easier to hit on people on the Internet than in the street.
examples.chinese: 在网上勾人比在街上容易。

current_entries.en_definition: An attack on a location, person or people.
(Internet) A measured visit to a web site, a request for a single file from a web server.
(computing, Internet) A match found by searching a computer system or search engine
A premeditated murder done for criminal or political purposes.
(transitive) To come into contact with forcefully and suddenly.
(transitive) To administer a blow to, directly or with a weapon or missile.
(transitive) To manage to touch (a target) in the right place.
A hidden supply or fund.
(archaeology) A cache of valuable objects or artefacts; a trove.
(transitive) To amass, usually for one's own private collection.
The tarsal joint of a digitigrade quadruped, such as a horse, pig or dog.
A day on which a festival, religious event, or national celebration is traditionally observed.

examples.english: You've worked hard for months and have certainly earned a holiday.
examples.chinese: 你已經辛苦地工作好幾個月了, 當然可以休假。

current_entries.en_definition: A day declared free from work by the state or government.
(chiefly, UK, Australia) A period of one or more days taken off work for leisure and often travel; often plural.
(chiefly, UK, Australia) A period during which pupils do not attend their school; often plural; rarely used for students at university (usually: vacation).
The place that is one's home.
(transitive) To sharpen with a hone; to whet.
(transitive) To use a hone to produce a precision bore.
(transitive) To refine (a skill especially) by learning.

A substance made by bees (clade Anthophila) primarily from beeswax which has hexagonal cells to hold their larvae, and for storing pollen and honey to feed the larvae and themselves when other food is scarce; it is also eaten by humans as part of comb-honey; (countable) a single sheet made up of two layers of this substance.
The tip of a toe of an ungulate such as a horse, ox or deer, strengthened by a thick keratin covering.

examples.english: I am so exhausted because I have padded the hoof for 4 hours.
examples.chinese: 走了四个小时，我觉得非常累了。

current_entries.en_definition: A rod bent into a curved shape, typically with one end free and the other end secured to a rope or other attachment.

examples.english: Hang your coat on the hook.
examples.chinese: 把你的外套掛在鉤子上。

current_entries.en_definition: (boxing) a type of punch delivered with the arm rigid and partially bent and the fist travelling nearly horizontally mesially along an arc
A circular band of metal used to bind a barrel.
Any member of the species Equus ferus, including the Przewalski's horse and the extinct Equus ferus ferus.

examples.english: The horse stopped and wouldn't move.
examples.chinese: 這匹馬停下來不動了。

current_entries.en_definition: Initialism of Hypertext Markup Language.
A color, or shade of color; tint; dye.

examples.english: As it oxidizes, the color turns blue and finally becomes a brilliant reddish-purple hue.
examples.chinese: 隨氧化變成藍色，最終呈現出鮮豔的紅紫色。

current_entries.en_definition: (fantasy, scifi, mythology) A human as contrasted from superficially similar but typically more powerful humanoid creatures; a member of the human race.

examples.english: To err is human, to forgive divine.
examples.chinese: 人皆有錯，唯聖者能恕。

current_entries.en_definition: A mound of earth.
A deformity in humans caused by abnormal curvature of the upper spine.
A rounded fleshy mass, such as on a camel or zebu.
(slang) A painfully boorish person.
(vulgar, slang, transitive, intransitive) To have sex (with).
A hump; a protuberance.
(athletics, horses) An artificial barrier, variously constructed, over which athletes or horses jump in a race.
(figuratively) An obstacle, real or perceived, physical or abstract.
(intransitive) To do things quickly.

examples.english: You didn't need to hurry.
examples.chinese: 你不需要著急。

current_entries.en_definition: The dry, leafy or stringy exterior of certain vegetables or fruits, which must be removed before eating the meat inside.

examples.english: I am going to husk rice.
examples.chinese: 我要去碾米。

current_entries.en_definition: (constellation) A spring constellation of the northern sky, said to resemble a serpent. It lies just south of the zodiac and contains the star Alphard.
(astronomy) One of Pluto's moons.
A state of the United States, named for the people.
A river in Oregon, United States that flows from the southwestern corner of the state into the Rogue River.
The act of imitating.

examples.english: What is the difference between imitation and real diamonds?

current_entries.en_definition: (attributive) A copy or simulation; something that is not the real thing.
The name and details of a publisher or printer, as printed in a book etc.; a publishing house.
A distinctive marking, symbol or logo.
To allow for the possibility that.
(mostly, North American) If.
Fully; to the whole extent.
Biotic material that releases fragrant smoke when burnt, often used in religious rites or for aesthetic reasons.
An English unit of length equal to 1/12 of a foot or 2.54 cm, conceived as roughly the width of a thumb.

examples.english: Give him an inch and he'll take a yard.

current_entries.en_definition: Any of various similar units of length in other traditional systems of measurement.
An event or occurrence.
An event that causes or may cause an interruption or a crisis, such as a workplace illness or a software error.
Succeeding to an office or other position.
Of or relating to the family of languages originally spoken in Europe and Western Asia.
Of or relating to the hypothetical parent language of the Indo-European language family.
Of or relating to the hypothetical group of peoples that spread early Indo-European languages.
Of low rank, standard or quality.
Indefinably large, countlessly great; immense. [from 14th c.]

examples.english: The eternal silence of these infinite spaces terrifies me.
examples.chinese: 這些無限空間的永恆沉默使我恐懼。

current_entries.en_definition: Boundless, endless, without end or limits; innumerable. [from 15th c.]
(mathematics) Greater than any positive quantity or magnitude; limitless. [from 17th c.]
Free from guilt, sin, or immorality.

examples.english: Masaru claims that he is innocent.
examples.chinese: 勝聲稱他是無辜的。

current_entries.en_definition: Bearing no legal responsibility for a wrongful act.
Without wrongful intent; accidental or in good faith.
Naive; artless.
Within or towards the interior of something; within the scope or limits of something (a place), especially a building.
The interior or inner part.
The side of a curved road, racetrack etc. that has the shorter arc length; the side of a racetrack nearer the interior of the course or some other point of reference.
Within the interior of something, closest to the center or to a specific point of reference.
A device used to produce music.

examples.english: Do you play a musical instrument?
examples.chinese: 你演奏樂器嗎？

current_entries.en_definition: A measuring or displaying device.
A tool, implement used for manipulation or measurement.
(legal) A legal document, such as a contract, deed, trust, mortgage, power, indenture, or will.
(figuratively) A person used as a mere tool for achieving a goal.
Being between two extremes, or in the middle of a range.
Anything in an intermediate position.
An intermediary.
common to, or affecting, two or more nations.

current_entries.en_definition: Of or concerning the association called the International.
Not variable; unalterable; uniform; always having the same value.
(math) Constant.
(operations) The stock of an item on hand at a particular location or business.

(operations) The process of producing or updating such a list.
Pertaining to or originating from Ireland or the Irish people.
Pertaining to the Irish language.
The Gaelic language indigenous to Ireland, also known as Irish Gaelic.
Nonstandard; not conforming to rules or expectations.

examples.english: I don't like learning irregular verbs.

current_entries.en_definition: Without symmetry, regularity, or uniformity.

A en given name derived from a pet form of the name John. Occasionally a diminutive of other given names such as Jackson, Jacob, Jacqueline or Jonathan.

examples.english: My name is Jack.
examples.chinese: 我叫Jack。

current_entries.en_definition: (countable, now, chiefly, US) A man, a fellow; a typical man; men in general. [from 16th c.]
(electronics) A switch for a jack plug, a jackknife switch; (more generally) a socket used to connect a device to a circuit, network etc. [from 19th c.]
A mechanical device used to raise and (temporarily) support a heavy object, now especially to lift one side of a motor vehicle when (e.g.) changing a tyre. [from 17th c.]
(nautical) A small ship's flag used as a signal or identifying device; a small flag flown at the bow of the vessel. [from 17th c.]
(transitive, colloquial) To steal (something), typically an automobile; to rob (someone).
(Mormonism) The fifth son of Lehi and one of the younger brothers of Nephi, author of one of the books in the Book of Mormon.

(biblical character) One of the sons of Isaac and Rebecca, and twin brother of Esau; father of the Israelites (Jews and Samaritans) by 12 sons by 4 consorts, most famously Judah and Joseph who fathered Manasseh.
A small, approximately cylindrical container, normally made of clay or glass, for holding fruit, preserves, etc., or for ornamental purposes.

examples.english: There are some cookies in the jar.

current_entries.en_definition: A container and its contents; as much as fills such a container; a jarful.
(countable, now, rare) A disagreement, a dispute, a quarrel; (uncountable) contention, discord; quarrelling.
One of the bones, usually bearing teeth, which form the framework of the mouth.

The bone of the lower jaw; the mandible.
Any of the bones in the lower or upper jaw.
Coal-black; the blackest black.

A en given name.

(ambitransitive) To bump into or brush against while in motion; to push aside.
The smallest letter or stroke of any writing; an iota.

(biblical, archaic) Alternative form of Jude, the penultimate book of the Bible and its ascribed author, Jude the Apostle (Judas Thaddaeus).
A public official whose duty it is to administer the law, especially by presiding over trials and rendering judgments; a justice.

examples.english: I can't judge distance.

current_entries.en_definition: A person who decides the fate of someone or something that has been called into question.

The amount that a jug can hold.

A feast or banquet.
A pleasure trip; a journey made for feasting or enjoyment, now especially a trip made ostensibly for business but which entails merrymaking or entertainment.

A rounded protuberance, especially one arising from a flat surface; a fleshy lump or caruncle.

(cooking) A dollop, an amount just larger than a spoonful (usually referring to butter).

A young sheep.
The flesh of a lamb or sheep used as food.
(figuratively) A person who is meek, docile and easily led.
A portion of land or territory as defined by its landform, its geographical (and architectural) features.

current_entries.en_definition: The pictorial aspect of a country.
A space, indoor or outdoor and natural or man-made (as in "designed landscape")
A temporary failure; a slip.

Foam from profuse sweating, as of a horse.
Of or relating to Latin: the language spoken in ancient Rome and other cities of Latium.

current_entries.en_definition: Of or relating to the script of the language spoken in ancient Rome and many modern alphabets.
The language of the ancient Romans, other Latins and of the Roman Catholic church, especially Classical Latin.
Relating to or being the second of two items.
Near (or nearer) to the end.
In the past, but close (or closer) to the present time.

Of or pertaining to the political left.
In accordance with the law or established legal forms and requirements.
Authentic, real, genuine.
A en given name, borne by numerous saints and 14 popes.

The act of levying.
The Chinese mile, a traditional unit of distance equal to 1500 chis or 150 zhangs, now standardized as a half-kilometer (500 meters).

examples.english: She is Li Ying.

A legal document giving official permission to do something; a permit.

examples.english: I think you'll have very little difficulty in getting a driver's license.

Excessive freedom; lack of due restraint.

current_entries.zh_definition: 营 业 执 照
current_entries.en_definition: The legal terms under which a person is allowed to use a product, especially software.
A person who cannot handle their drink; one who gets drunk on very little alcohol.
Very small, diminutive
(anatomy, dentistry, relational) Related to, near, or on the side toward the tongue.
Either of the two fleshy protrusions around the opening of the mouth.
A part of the body that resembles a lip, such as the edge of a wound or the labia.
(by extension, countable) The projecting rim of an open container or a bell, etc.; a short open spout.
(slang) Drunk, intoxicated; under the influence of drugs or alcohol.
(slang) Excellent, fantastic; cool.
Straw, grass, and similar loose material used as bedding for people or animals. [1325]

A mobile bed or couch transported upon or suspended from poles placed over human shoulders or animal backs. [1330s]
(medical, countable) Synonym of stretcher, such a vehicle used for transporting the sick and injured, inclusive of designs carried in the hand.
(transitive) To give birth to, in the manner of animals.
(ball sports) A pass or stroke which arcs high into the air.
To try to see, to pay attention to with one’s eyes.

examples.english: I wouldn't have thought I would someday look up "Viagra" in Wikipedia.

A racing sled for one or two people that is ridden with the rider or riders lying on their back.
The sport of racing on luges.

Wolfish (all senses); wolflike.
To soften (something) or separate it into pieces by soaking it in a heated or unheated liquid.

Chief, most important, or principal in extent, size, or strength; consisting of the largest part.
Brand; marque; manufacturer; maker.

examples.english: It's no use pretending to make me believe that I believe things you don't believe!
examples.chinese: 要我相信我會相信你不相信的東西是没用的！

current_entries.en_definition: Belonging to the sex which typically produces sperm, or to the gender which is typically associated with it. [from 14th c.]
Having the characteristics of a man.

examples.english: It is not manly to speak ill of others behind their backs.
examples.chinese: 在背后说别人坏话不是大丈夫所为。

current_entries.en_definition: Having qualities viewed as befitting a man; manful; courageous, resolute, noble.
Province of Lombardy, Italy.
City and capital of Mantua.
The third month of the Gregorian calendar, following February and preceding April, containing the northward equinox.

examples.english: Miss March gave me an English dictionary.
examples.chinese: 三月小姐給了我一本英語詞典。

current_entries.en_definition: A formal, rhythmic way of walking, used especially by soldiers, by bands, and in ceremonies.
A political rally or parade.
Any song in the genre of music written for marching (see Wikipedia's article on this type of music)
Steady forward movement or progression.
(historical) A region at a frontier governed by a marquess.
(geography) Sharing a border; geographically adjacent.

examples.english: There is only a marginal difference between the two.
examples.chinese: 兩者之間只有很小的差別。

current_entries.en_definition: (politics, chiefly, UK, Australia, NZ, of a constituency) Subject to a change in sitting member with only a small change in voting behaviour, this usually being inferred from the small winning margin of the previous election.
Of a value, or having a characteristic that is of a value, that is close to being unacceptable or leading to exclusion from a group or category.
A group of potential or current customers for one's product.

examples.english: Did you buy it on the black market?
examples.chinese: 你是在黑市上买的它吗？

current_entries.en_definition: A geographical area or region where a certain commercial demand exists.
The sum total traded in a process of individuals trading for certain commodities.
(intransitive) To enter into the conjugal or connubial state; to take a husband or a wife. [from 14th c.]

examples.english: Why would you marry a woman if you like men?
examples.chinese: 喜欢男人，为什么还要和女人结婚？

current_entries.en_definition: (transitive) To arrange for the marriage of; to give away as wife or husband. [from 14th c.]
(transitive) To unite in wedlock or matrimony; to perform the ceremony of joining spouses; to bring about a marital union according to the laws or customs of a place. [from 16th c.]
(transitive, figuratively) To unite; to join together into a close union. [from 15th c.]
(historical) A high-ranking officer in the household of a medieval prince or lord, who was originally in charge of the cavalry and later the military forces in general.
A military officer of the highest rank in several countries, including France and the former Soviet Union; equivalent to a general of the army in the United States. See also field marshal.
(astrology) A person under the astrological influence of the planet Mars.
(chiefly, science fiction) An inhabitant of the planet Mars.

One who willingly accepts being put to death or willingly accepts challenging and exposing iniquity done to oneself for adhering openly to one's religious beliefs; notably, saints canonized after red martyrdom.
(by extension) One who sacrifices their life, station, or something of great personal value, for the sake of principle or to sustain a cause.
(with a prepositional phrase of cause) One who suffers greatly and/or constantly, even involuntarily.
Of or pertaining to the male sex; biologically male, not female.
Belonging to males; typically used by males.
(of a noun) Being of the masculine class or grammatical gender, and inflected in that manner.
(transitive) To convert into a mash; to reduce to a soft pulpy state by beating or pressure
(transitive, UK, mostly, Northern England, Lancashire, Yorkshire) To prepare a cup of tea in a teapot; to brew (tea).
(ambitransitive) To press down hard (on).
A cover, or partial cover, for the face, used for disguise or protection.

examples.english: The man wore a mask of a tiger.
examples.chinese: 男人戴了一个老虎面具。

current_entries.en_definition: That which disguises; a pretext or subterfuge.
An assembly or party of people wearing (usually elaborate or fanciful) masks and costumes, and amusing themselves with dancing, conversation, or other diversions.
(figuratively) An act of living under false pretenses; a concealment of something by a false or unreal show; a disguise, a pretence; also, a pretentious display.
(physics) Matter made up of normal particles, not antiparticles.

examples.english: I look forward to hearing your thoughts on this matter.
examples.chinese: 我期待听到你在这件事上的想法 。

current_entries.en_definition: A kind of substance.
An affair, condition, or subject, especially one of concern or (especially when preceded by the) one that is problematic.
The highest limit.
(mathematics) The greatest value of a set or other mathematical structure, especially the global maximum or a local maximum of a function.
(geography) One of a series of regular sinuous curves, bends, loops, turns, or windings in the channel of a river, stream, or other watercourse
A tortuous or winding journey.
The denotation, referent, or idea connected with a word, expression, or symbol.
The purpose, value, or significance (of something) beyond the fact of that thing's existence.
During the time that something is happening, often specifically in a different place.
During an intervening time; from now until a future time.
(now, chiefly, historical) A manual worker; a labourer or artisan. [from 16th c.]

examples.english: The mechanic assembled the engine.
examples.chinese: 這名技師組裝了這台引擎。

current_entries.en_definition: Someone who builds or repairs machinery, a technician; now specifically, someone who works with and repairs the mechanical parts of a motor vehicle, aircraft or similar. [from 17th c.]
(card games) Especially in games of the rummy family: a combination of playing cards which is announced or played to score points. [from late 19th c.]
(ergative) To change (or to be changed) from a solid state to a liquid state, usually by a gradual heat.

examples.english: A plastic dish will melt on the stove.
examples.chinese: 塑料盘子在烤箱里会化的。

current_entries.en_definition: (intransitive, figuratively) To dissolve, disperse, vanish.

(transitive, figurative) To soften, as by a warming or kindly influence; to relax; to render gentle or susceptible to mild influences; sometimes, in a bad sense, to take away the firmness of; to weaken.
(astronomy) The first planet in the Solar system with the closest orbit to the Sun, named after the god; represented by ☿.

examples.english: That one over there is Mercury.
examples.chinese: 那邊那顆是水星。

current_entries.en_definition: (Roman god) The Roman god associated with speed, sometimes used as a messenger, wearing winged sandals; the Roman counterpart of the Greek god Hermes.
(with definite article) Ambient pressure or temperature (from the use of mercury in barometers and thermometers). [from 17th c.]
(science, historical) One of the elemental principles formerly thought to be present in all metals. [from 15th c.]
Just, only; no more than, pure and simple, neither more nor better than might be expected. [from 16th c.]

examples.english: I'm not a real fish, I'm just a mere plushy.
examples.chinese: 我不是一条真的鱼，我只是一个长毛绒玩具。

current_entries.en_definition: Of, relating to, or characteristic of metal.
(of a color) Having the appearance of being of polished metal.
(Greek god) A Titan who was the personification of wisdom, the first spouse of Zeus, and the mother of Athena
(astronomy) A satellite of Jupiter.
(sometimes, derogatory) A very small thing; especially one which is conspicuously smaller than expected or by comparison. [from early 19th c.]
(derogatory, offensive) A short person. [from later 19th c.]
Power, strength, force, or influence held by a person or group.

examples.english: As long as you are here, we might as well begin.
examples.chinese: 既然你在這裡, 那我們就開始吧。

current_entries.en_definition: The ability to do something.
Physical strength or force.
(auxiliary) Used to indicate conditional or possible actions; would perhaps/maybe.
(uncountable, by extension) A white (or whitish) liquid obtained from a vegetable source such as almonds, coconuts, oats, rice, or soy beans.

examples.english: Add a little milk.
examples.chinese: 加点牛奶。

current_entries.en_definition: (countable, informal) An individual serving of milk.
(music) Incorporating a minor third interval above the (in scales) tonic or (in chords) root note, (also, _, figurative) tending to produce a dark, discordant, sad, or pensive effect.

examples.english: A couple of flights were delayed on account of a minor accident.
examples.chinese: 因為一些小事故，兩、三班機被延遲了。

current_entries.en_definition: Lesser, smaller in importance, size, degree, seriousness, or significance compared to another option, particularly:
(Scots law, obsolete) An adolescent, a person above the legal age of puberty but below the age of majority.
A building or institution where money (originally, only coins) is produced under government licence.
The flavoring of the plant, either a sweet, a jelly or sauce.
A green color, like that of mint.
A mint-flavored candy, often eaten to sweeten the smell of the breath.
To invent; to forge; to fabricate; to fashion.
A unit of time which is one sixtieth of an hour (sixty seconds).

examples.english: A minute has sixty seconds.
examples.chinese: 一分钟有六十秒。

current_entries.en_definition: Deep mud; moist, spongy earth.
A state in the Midwestern region of the United States. Capital: Jefferson City. Largest city: Kansas City.

(with the) The longest river in North America, rising in the Rocky Mountains of western Montana and flowing roughly southeast over 2,300 miles through North Dakota, South Dakota, Nebraska, Iowa, Kansas and Missouri, before joining the Mississippi at St. Louis.
Water or other liquid finely suspended in air. (Compare fog, haze.)
The characteristic sound made by a cow or bull.
(onomatopoeia) The characteristic lowing sound made by cattle.
The Earth's moon; the sole natural satellite of the Earth, represented in astronomy and astrology by ☾.

examples.english: Tomorrow, he will land on the moon.
examples.chinese: 明天，他将登上月球。

current_entries.en_definition: (informal, by extension of Moon) Any natural satellite of a planet.
(literary) A month, particularly a lunar month.
A member of the Moravian Church.
Used to form the comparative form of adjectives and adverbs. [from 13thc.]

examples.english: For some reason I feel more alive at night.
examples.chinese: 不知道為什麼我夜裡覺得比較有活力。

current_entries.en_definition: in greater number. (Used for a discrete quantity.)
in greater quantity, amount, or proportion. (Used for a continuous quantity.)
Additional; further.
Bigger, stronger, or more valuable.
A mixture of lime or cement, sand and water used for bonding building blocks.
A hollow vessel used to pound, crush, rub, grind or mix ingredients with a pestle.
(countable, military, historical) A short, heavy, large-bore cannon designed for indirect fire at very steep trajectories.

(countable, military) A relatively lightweight, often portable indirect fire weapon which transmits recoil to a base plate and is designed to lob explosive shells at very steep trajectories. [from 20th c.]

A left tributary of Rhine, flowing through the departments of Vosges, Meurthe-et-Moselle and Moselle in northeastern France, through Luxembourg, and through the states of Rhineland-Palatinate and Saarland, Germany.
A department of Grand Est, France.

(usually, in plural) A small ball of chemical pesticide (typically naphthalene) and deodorant placed in or around clothing and other articles susceptible to damage from mold or moth larvae in order to protect them from this damage.
A state of progression from one place to another.
(philosophy) from κίνησις (kinesis); any change. Traditionally of four types: generation and corruption, alteration, augmentation and diminution, and change of place.
A natural elevation appearing as if thrown up artificially; a regular and isolated hill, hillock, or knoll.
Any small rodent of the genus Mus.

examples.english: A mouse is a timid creature.
examples.chinese: 老鼠是胆小的生物。

current_entries.en_definition: (computing) An input device that is moved over a pad or other flat surface to produce a corresponding movement of a pointer on a graphical display.
The end of a river out of which water flows into a sea or other large body of water; or the end of a tributary out of which water flows into a larger river.

examples.english: Open your mouth!
examples.chinese: 把嘴张开！

current_entries.en_definition: (transitive, ergative) To cause to change place or posture in any manner; to set in motion; to carry, convey, draw, or push from one place to another

examples.english: It's your move.
examples.chinese: 該你走了。

current_entries.en_definition: Slimy mud, sludge.
Soft (or slimy) manure.
A mixture of water and soil or fine grained sediment.

examples.english: The car got stuck in the mud.
examples.chinese: 這輛車陷在泥裡了。

current_entries.en_definition: (figuratively) Willfully abusive, even slanderous remarks or claims, notably between political opponents.
A large cup for beverages, usually having a handle and used without a saucer.A mug
(slang, often, derogatory) The face.
(slang, derogatory) A gullible or easily cheated person.
To eat vigorously or with excitement.
Darkness, or a dark or gloomy environment.
Any low, indistinct sound, like that of running water.

examples.english: The murmur of the brook lulls me to sleep.
examples.chinese: 溪流潺潺，催我入眠。

current_entries.en_definition: (cardiology, medicine) The sound made by any condition which produces a noisy, or turbulent, flow of blood through the heart.
A muttered complaint or protest; the expression of dissatisfaction in a low muttering voice; any expression of complaint or discontent.
Something that is mandatory, required or recommended.

examples.english: I must admit that I snore.
examples.chinese: 我必須承認我打呼。

current_entries.en_definition: To do as a requirement; indicates that the sentence subject is required as an imperative or directive to execute the sentence predicate, with failure to do so resulting in a failure or negative consequence.
Used to indicate that something is very likely, probable, or certain to be true.
(formal) Ten thousand; 10,000 [from 16th c.]
Any nounal word or phrase which indicates a particular person, place, class, or thing.

examples.english: All you have to do is sign your name here.
examples.chinese: 你在這裏簽個名就行了。

current_entries.en_definition: Napoleon Bonaparte (1769–1821), a French military commander and political leader.
A en given name sometimes given in honor of the French emperor.

(pharmaceutical drug) Any substance or drug that reduces pain, induces sleep and may alter mood or behaviour; in some contexts, especially in reference to the opiates-and-opioids class, especially in reference to illegal drugs, and often both.
(archaic, otherwise, jocular) Or rather, or should I say; moreover (introducing a stronger and more appropriate expression than the preceding one). [from 16th c.]
Next to, close to.

examples.english: There is a hospital nearby.
examples.chinese: 附近有一家医院。

current_entries.en_definition: Required, essential, whether logically inescapable or needed in order to achieve a desired result or avoid some penalty.
Unavoidable, inevitable.
(obsolete) Determined, involuntary: acting from compulsion rather than free will.
(anatomy) The part of the body connecting the head and the trunk found in humans and some animals.
The tapered part of a bottle toward the opening.
Not positive or neutral; bad; undesirable; unfavourable.
(physics) Of electrical charge of an electron and related particles [from the 18th c.]
(linguistics, logic) Denying a proposition; negating a concept.
(photography) An image in which dark areas represent light ones, and the converse. [from 19th c.]
(mathematics) A negative quantity.
The residential area near one's home.

examples.english: The whole neighborhood was surprised at the news.
examples.chinese: 整个小区对这个消息很惊讶。

current_entries.en_definition: The inhabitants of a residential area.
(chiefly, obsolete) The quality of being a neighbor, of living nearby, next to each other; proximity.
A set containing an open set which contains some specified point.
A set containing an open ball which contains a specified point.
A formal or informal division of a municipality or region.
An approximate amount.
Not either (used with nor).
Not one of two; not either; not one or the other.
Not either one of two.
(physics) Neither positive nor negative; possessing no charge or equivalent positive and negative charge such that there is no imbalance.

examples.english: Switzerland is a neutral country.
examples.chinese: 瑞士是一个中立的国家。

current_entries.en_definition: (chemistry) Having a pH of or near 7, neither acidic nor alkaline.
(transitive) To turn (someone) into a newt, especially by magic.
(by extension, informal, transitive) To (usually temporarily) expel a user from a MUD or similar system
Nearest in order, succession, or rank; immediately following (or sometimes preceding) in order.

examples.english: It may freeze next week.
examples.chinese: 下周可能会结冰。

current_entries.en_definition: The tip of a pen or tool that touches the surface, transferring ink to paper.
A piece of a roasted, hulled cocoa bean.
A small and pointed thing or part; a point; a prong.
(UK, Ireland, Commonwealth, law enforcement, slang) A police station or prison.

examples.english: You despise Nick, don't you?
examples.chinese: 你看不起尼克对吧？

current_entries.en_definition: A silvery elemental metal with an atomic number of 28 and symbol Ni.
Various sounds, usually unwanted or unpleasant.

examples.english: You have to put up with all this noise.
examples.chinese: 你必须忍受这一切的噪音了。

current_entries.en_definition: Sound or signal generated by random fluctuations.
(technology) Any part of a signal or data that reduces the clarity, precision, or quality of the desired output.
(genetics) The measured level of variation in gene expression among cells, regardless of source, within a supposedly identical population.
Of, resembling, relating to, or consisting of a name or names.
(finance) Of, relating to, or being the amount or face value of a sum of money or a stock certificate, for example, and not the purchasing power or market value.
A painting, sculpture, photograph or other artwork or mass-media-reproduced image depicting one or more human figure(s) in a state of near or total undress.
(transitive) To push against gently, especially in order to gain attention or give a signal.
An abstract entity used to describe quantity.

examples.english: Due to a number of unfortunate causes, one-parent families are on the increase.
examples.chinese: 由于诸多不幸因素，单親家庭的數量在增長中。

current_entries.en_definition: (predicative, _, only) Inoperative, disabled.

examples.english: Get off the lawn!
examples.chinese: 離開草坪!

current_entries.en_definition: In a direction away from the speaker or other reference point.

examples.english: I shouldn't have logged off.
examples.chinese: 我不该退出的。

current_entries.en_definition: One who has a position of authority in a hierarchical organization, especially in military, police or government organizations.
A respectful term of address for an officer, especially a police officer.
Anything that acts as counterbalance; a compensating equivalent.

(international trade) A form of countertrade arrangement, in which the seller agrees to purchase within a set time frame products of a certain value from the buying country. This kind of agreement may be used in large international public sector contracts such as arms sales.
Of a living being, having lived for most of the expected years.

examples.english: I am too old for this world.
examples.chinese: 我對這個世界来說太老了。

current_entries.en_definition: Something which portends or is perceived to portend either a good or evil event or circumstance in the future, or which causes a foreboding; a portent or augury.

examples.english: His laziness is a bad omen for the future.
examples.chinese: 他的懒惰是他未来不好的预兆。

current_entries.en_definition: A thing of prophetic significance.
(idiomatic) Exactly; precisely, especially of a time of day.
(idiomatic) Actively traveling; busy; moving often.
In progress; having started.
(idiomatic) Coming; approaching.
On the direct route that one intends to travel.
While travelling.
A gap permitting passage through.

examples.english: Would you mind opening the window?
examples.chinese: 你介意打開窗戶嗎?

current_entries.en_definition: The first performance of a show or play by a particular troupe.
In an opposite position.
Something opposite or contrary to something else.
An antonym.
Facing, or across from.
(relational) Of, or relating to the eye or to vision.
(optics, relational) Of, or relating to optics or optical instruments.
Having the colour of the fruit of an orange tree; yellowred; reddish-yellow.

examples.english: My mother bought two bottles of orange juice.
examples.chinese: 我母亲买了两瓶橙汁。

current_entries.en_definition: Any round citrus fruit with a yellow-red colour when ripe and a sour-sweet taste; the fruit of the orange tree.
An orange-coloured and orange-flavoured cordial.
An orange-coloured and orange-flavoured soft drink.
Arrangement, disposition, or sequence.

examples.english: Every function should have comments describing its purpose in order to avoid confusion.
examples.chinese: 每一個函數都應该有描述其目的的注释以避免误解。

current_entries.en_definition: (physiology, medicine) Pertaining to an organ of the body of a living organism.
(chemistry) Relating to the compounds of carbon, relating to natural products.
(not comparable) Relating to the origin or beginning; preceding all others.
An element of decoration; that which embellishes or adorns.
(music) A musical flourish that is unnecessary to the overall melodic or harmonic line, but serves to decorate that line.
Taken from among; expressing a fraction of (a larger number); [from 15th c.]
(informal) In a manner based in but not always in (a certain place); (loosely) in.
A piece of land that stands out (usually into water) from the land surrounding.
Excess; a state of being more than it ought to be.

(property law) Any additional sums payable following the purchase of land, calculated on a prearranged basis, on the occurrence of certain specified events that are deemed to increase the value of that land; usually in the context of the development and further sale of that land.
(ambitransitive) To turn over, capsize or upset.

Any of certain marine bivalve mollusks, especially those of the family Ostreidae (the true oysters), usually found adhering to rocks or other fixed objects in shallow water along the seacoasts, or in brackish water in the mouth of rivers.
(colloquial, by analogy) A person who keeps secrets.

A two-handed implement consisting of a shaft with one or two blades attached to the end(s) used to propel a canoe, kayak or a small boat. A paddle is unattached to the boat and freely operated with the hands, compared with an oar which is attached to the boat at a pivot point.
A blade of a waterwheel.
A kitchen utensil shaped like a paddle and used for mixing, beating etc.
In a sluice, a panel that controls the flow of water.
(computing) A screenful of text and possibly other content; especially, the digital simulation of one side of a paper leaf.

examples.english: Open your book to page nine.
examples.chinese: 打開你的書到第九頁。

current_entries.en_definition: the action of applying paint
an illustration or artwork using paint
(Greek god) Greek god of nature, often visualized as half goat and half man playing pipes. His Roman counterpart is Faunus.
A wide, flat receptacle used around the house, especially for cooking.
(geography, geology) An expanse of level land located in a depression, especially
A sheet material typically used for writing on or printing on (or as a non-waterproof container), usually made by draining cellulose fibres from a suspension in water.

examples.english: I have to write a letter. Do you have some paper?
examples.chinese: 我需要寫一封信。你有纸嗎？

current_entries.en_definition: A work or performance that imitates another work or performance with ridicule or irony.
(countable, archaic) A popular maxim, adage, or proverb.
(transitive) To divide in two.

examples.english: Translate the underlined part.
examples.chinese: 翻译划線部分。

current_entries.en_definition: A fraction of a whole.

examples.english: Translate the underlined part.
examples.chinese: 翻译划線部分。

current_entries.en_definition: Existing as a part or portion; incomplete.

examples.english: It was only a partial success.
examples.chinese: 那只是部分的成功。

current_entries.en_definition: (mathematics) Of or relating to a partial derivative or partial differential.
Specific; discrete; concrete.

examples.english: I have no particular reason to do so.
examples.chinese: 我没有特别的理由去做。

current_entries.en_definition: (comparable) Of a person, concerned with, or attentive to, details; fastidious.
Concerned with, or attentive to, details; minute; circumstantial; precise.
Specialised; characteristic of a specific person or thing.
Distinguished in some way; special (often in negative constructions).
That which divides or separates; that by which different things, or distinct parts of the same thing, are separated; boundary; dividing line or space.
(computing) A section of a hard disk separately formatted.
(legal) A person or group of people constituting one side in a legal proceeding, such as in a legal action or a contract. [from ca. 1300s]

examples.english: I willingly join the Chinese Communist Party.
examples.chinese: 我自愿加入中國共產党。

current_entries.en_definition: (ditransitive) To cause to move or go; to send; to transfer from one person, place, or condition to another.

examples.english: If you study earnestly, you can expect to pass the exam.
examples.chinese: 如果你認真學習，就有希望通過考试。

current_entries.en_definition: An opening, road, or track, available for passing; especially, one through or over some dangerous or otherwise impracticable barrier such as a mountain range; a passageway; a defile; a ford.

examples.english: If you study earnestly, you can expect to pass the exam.
examples.chinese: 如果你認真學習，就有希望通過考试。

current_entries.en_definition: Being subjected to an action without producing a reaction.

examples.english: Watching TV is a passive activity.
examples.chinese: 看電視是一種被動的活動。

current_entries.en_definition: (grammar) Being in the passive voice.
Trite, being superficially complete, lacking originality.

examples.english: I felt somebody pat me on the shoulder.
examples.chinese: 我感覺有人拍了拍我的肩。

current_entries.en_definition: A light tap or slap, especially with the hands.
To (gently) tap the flat of one's hand on a person or thing.
(British) To cover something with paving slabs.
(Canada, US) To cover with stone, concrete, blacktop or other solid covering, especially to aid travel.
